option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# MyApplication
An Android application built with Jetpack Compose and Kotlin.
## Project Setup
### Requirements - Android Studio - Gradle 8.0 or higher - Kotlin 2.2.10 - AGP (Android Gradle Plugin) 9.1.0
### Building
To build the project:
```bash ./gradlew build ```
To run on a connected device or emulator:
```bash ./gradlew installDebug ```
## Dependencies
This project uses: - Jetpack Compose for UI - Material 3 Design System - Kotlin Coroutines - AndroidX libraries
## License
This project is open source.
